endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/attributeSearch/{query}
endpoints.description: Returns a list of xrefs and associated attributes that contain the query string for a given organism. Results are not restricted to exact matches. Optionally limit results to a specified number per data source, or by the type of attribute. See possible attribute types via /{organism}/attributeSet.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{QUERY}} with a real query. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/attributeSet
endpoints.description: Returns the supported attributes to the given Organism.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/attributes/{systemCode}/{identifier}
endpoints.description: Returns the attributes for a given identifier, data source, organism. Optionally display only a specified attribute
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SYSTEMCODE}} with a real systemcode. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism. Replace {{IDENTIFIER}} with a real identifier.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/isFreeSearchSupported
endpoints.description: Returns `true` or `false` based on whether or not /{organism}/search/{query} is supported for a given organism.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/isMappingSupported/{sourceSystemCode}/{targetSystemCode}
endpoints.description: Returns `true` or `false` based on whether or not /{organism}/xrefs/{systemCode}/{identifier} would possibly return a {targetSystemCode} result given a {sourceSystemCode} query. This function basically combines the results of /{organism}/sourceDataSources and /{organism}/targetDataSources into a single boolean result.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TARGETSYSTEMCODE}} with a real targetsystemcode. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism. Replace {{SOURCESYSTEMCODE}} with a real sourcesystemcode.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/properties
endpoints.description: Returns the list of properties available for a given organism
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/search/{query}
endpoints.description: Returns a list of xrefs with identifiers that contain the query string for a given organism. Results are not restricted to exact matches. Optionally limit results to a specified number per data source.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{QUERY}} with a real query. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/sourceDataSources
endpoints.description: Returns a list of data sources available as xref sources for a given organism.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/targetDataSources
endpoints.description: Returns a list of data sources available as xref targets for a given organism.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/xrefExists/{systemCode}/{identifier}
endpoints.description: Returns `true` or `false` based on whether or not an xref exists in the database given an identifier, data source, and organism.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SYSTEMCODE}} with a real systemcode. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism. Replace {{IDENTIFIER}} with a real identifier.

endpoints.name: GET /{organism}/xrefs/{systemCode}/{identifier}
endpoints.description: Returns a list of xrefs that map to a given identifier, data source, and organism.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SYSTEMCODE}} with a real systemcode. Replace {{ORGANISM}} with a real organism. Replace {{IDENTIFIER}} with a real identifier.
